subcodes.first_line: When thy book attained unto Our presence, We turned, through Our grace and favor, unto the verses recorded therein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: چون کتاب آنجناب لدی الوجه حاضر شد لذا محض فضل و عنایت بما ذکر فیه آیات
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @wisdom [hikmat], @acquiescence and resignation; contentment
